name: Cool Tropical Salad
recipeIngredient: 1 cup Mango chunks or melon balls
1 cup Diced papaya or fresh Peaches
2 cups Plain or vanilla yogurt (I like the vanilla, but it is sweet)
2 tablespoons Honey (can eliminate if Using vanilla yogurt)
recipeInstructions:
1. Cut pineapple in quarters, lengthwise.
2. Remove core; slice pineapple from shell and cut into cubes.
3. Refrigerate empty shell to chill until serving time.
4. Toss 1 cup of cubed pineapple with mango and papaya.
5. Chill.
6. To serve, place 1/3 cup yogurt in each pineapple shell and cover with mixed fruit.
7. Top with a layer of remaining yogurt, which has been sweetened with honey, and cover with sliced strawberries.
8. Garnish each serving with whole strawberry and a sprig of fresh mint.
Makes 4 generous servings.
